message:
Command `grep -n "write_core_def\|core.def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/*.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -20
# Also check the build.py or main runner
find /nc/apps/padframe-gen -name "build.py" -o -name "cli.py" -o -name "__main__.py" 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
grep -n "write_core_def\|core.def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/*.py 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -20
# Also check the build.py or main runner
find /nc/apps/padframe-gen -name "build.py" -o -name "cli.py" -o -name "__main__.py" 2>/dev/null | head -5
